canonical_definition: Benchmark dataset for clinical prediction tasks including trial approval, patient dropout, mortality, and adverse event prediction, used to evaluate model performance in biomedical contexts.
papers: Is Cognition Consistent with Perception? Assessing and Mitigating Multimodal Knowledge Conflicts in Document Understanding

definitions.paper: Is Cognition Consistent with Perception? Assessing and Mitigating Multimodal Knowledge Conflicts in Document Understanding

relationships.evidence: We evaluate AUTOCT primarily on the Trial Approval Prediction task from the TrialBench benchmark (Chen et al., 2024), which includes 24,468 training and 6,215 test samples. (Section 4.2)

characterization: Benchmark dataset for clinical prediction tasks including trial approval, patient dropout, mortality, and adverse event prediction, used to evaluate model performance in biomedical contexts.
